title: Add graph-based filtering functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: cgb_make_graph(), cgb_filter(), cgb_smooth(), cgb_smooth_loro(), cgb_nuisance(), laplace_enhance(). These provide connectivity-graph-based spatial filtering.

title: Add ROIVecWindow class
description: R neuroim2 has ROIVecWindow: windowed ROI vector similar to ROIVolWindow but for 4D data. Additional slots: parent_index, center_index.

title: Remove LatentNeuroVec (no R equivalent)
description: LatentNeuroVec exists in pyneuroim but has no equivalent in neuroim2. Remove src/pyneuroim/latent_neuro_vec.py, tests/test_latent_neuro_vec.py, and all imports. NOTE: not imported in __init__.py so no export cleanup needed. Files need manual deletion (rm blocked by sandbox).

title: Add orientation/affine utility functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: affine_to_orientation(), affine_to_axcodes(), axcodes_to_orientation(), apply_orientation(), orientation_inverse_affine(), obliquity(), vox2out_vox(), perm_mat(), rescale_affine(). These are core spatial operations.

title: Remove MappedNeuroHyperVec (no R equivalent)
description: MappedNeuroHyperVec exists in pyneuroim but has no equivalent in neuroim2. Remove from neuro_hypervec.py and __init__.py exports.
close_reason: Removed MappedNeuroHyperVec class from neuro_hypervec.py, factory function, __init__.py exports, and test.

title: Port parity bug hunt: neuroim2 parity sweep
description: Fixed ordering leakage in searchlight high-level outputs: stop treating parent_index as C-order ravel index by writing via parent_grid + indexing source data with order='F'. Updated tests to validate parents via grid coords instead of ravel offsets. Added opacity note for parent_index contract.
notes:
Started party kickoff via Agent Mail: notified BlueFalcon (bug hunt) and RedFalcon (test creation); seeded checkpoints issued.
Aligned with broader team thread #9. Expanded recipients now include GoldLake, IvoryMeadow, JadeWaterfall, TealBadger, SapphireRiver, GentleFox, CopperPond; requesting [issue,path,input,expected,actual] plus confidence tags.
Sent additional checkpoint reminder in parity thread #9 to BlueFalcon/RedFalcon/CopperPond: report (A) confirmed mismatch tuples or (B) lane coverage + no issues; cadence every 2h.,
23:06 checkpoint: no concrete mismatches reported by incoming loop yet; multiple agents (via thread) request coverage/no-issue summaries. Instructed lanes to report thread#9 (A) issue/path/input/expected/actual mismatch tuples or (B) module coverage + no-issue + next module.
23:06:35 direct status pings sent to BlueFalcon (bug findings) and RedFalcon (test plan), plus coordination close-loop to CopperPond/SapphireRiver. Awaiting responses in thread 9 and direct inbox.
23:07: received consolidated thread update: still zero confirmed mismatches. Issued final checkpoint request (30+ minute hold window) asking A) confirmed tuple with fix-test or B) module no-issue + next target; instructed de-scope/reassign after two silent windows.

title: Fix parity blockers reported by first pass
description: Close any concrete parity failures with targeted patches and add safety tests where behavior diverges.

title: API parity scan for neuroim2 behavioral mismatches
description: Find functions with missing args, return-shape, exception differences, and default behavior mismatches.
notes: Assigned parity hunt sweep to BlueFalcon; collecting initial API/behavior mismatches.

title: Create regression tests for all confirmed parity defects
description: Add deterministic tests for each mismatch found in the parity sweep; include negative and edge-case coverage.
notes: Assigned regression test creation to RedFalcon; drafting initial deterministic parity test modules.

title: Add data manipulation functions (concat, scale_series, mapf, downsample)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: concat() for concatenating volumes/vectors in time dimension, scale_series() for per-voxel time-series normalization, mapf() for applying mapping functions, downsample() for reducing spatial resolution.

title: Add ROI shape factory functions
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: spherical_roi_set(), cube_roi(), square_roi(), ellipsoid_shape(), cube_shape(), blobby_shape(), patch_set(). These extend the existing spherical_roi/cuboid_roi factories.

title: Add IndexLookupVol class
description: R neuroim2 has IndexLookupVol: maps 1D grid indices to sparse table indices. Slots: space, indices, map. Used internally for sparse representations.

title: Run stress/invariant checks and file-based fuzz tests
description: Generate synthetic data inputs and boundary cases for neuroimpy operations; report flaky or deterministic failures for parity mismatches.
notes: Assigned invariant/fuzz-style checks to BlueFalcon in support of parity hunt.

title: Add indexing functions (linear_access, matricized_access, from/to_matvec, dot_reduce)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: linear_access() for extraction using linear indices, matricized_access() for time-space index matrix extraction, from_matvec()/to_matvec() for matrix-vector conversions, dot_reduce() for dot product reduction.

title: Add simulation and analysis utilities
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: simulate_fmri() for generating synthetic fMRI data, prepare_confounds() for confound variable preparation, make_time_weights() for time-based weights.

title: Add NIfTI extension support
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: NiftiExtension, NiftiExtensionList, NiftiExtensionCodes classes, plus parse_extension(), parse_afni_extension(), get_afni_attribute(), list_afni_attributes() functions.

title: Add read_image() dispatch and load_data() generic
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: read_image() auto-dispatches to read_vol or read_vec based on file dimensions. load_data() is a generic loader from Source objects.

title: Add searchlight variants (resampled_searchlight, cluster_searchlight_series)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: resampled_searchlight() and cluster_searchlight_series(). These are specialized searchlight analysis variants.

title: Add visualization functions (plot_ortho, plot_montage, plot_overlay, color mapping)
description: Missing from neuroim2 parity: plot_ortho() for orthogonal 3-plane view, plot_montage() for slice montages, plot_overlay() for image overlays, mapToColors(), resolve_cmap(), plus matplotlib equivalents of scale_fill_neuro()/theme_neuro().

title: Add NeuroBucket class
description: R neuroim2 has NeuroBucket: a sequence of labeled NeuroVol objects forming a named 4D representation. Needs slots: labels (list[str]), data (list[NeuroVol]).

title: Add ClusteredNeuroVec class
description: R neuroim2 has ClusteredNeuroVec: 4D data with cluster assignments and shared time-series per cluster. Slots: cvol (ClusteredNeuroVol), ts (matrix), cl_map (int), label.

title: Add Source factory classes (NeuroVolSource, NeuroVecSource, etc.)
description: R neuroim2 has a Source pattern for lazy object construction from files: NeuroVolSource, NeuroVecSource, SparseNeuroVecSource, MappedNeuroVecSource. These extend FileSource and allow deferred loading.

title: Fix NotImplementedError stubs across codebase
description:
16 NotImplementedError stubs remain:
- big_neuro_vec.py: linear index extraction (2)
- file_backed_neuro_vec.py: linear index extraction, read-only (3)
- neuro_vec.py: bare NotImplementedError line 173, masking line 679 (2)
- neuro_vol.py: SparseNeuroVol complex __setitem__ (1)
- stats.py: split_scale for sparse NeuroVec (1)
- file_format.py: AFNI format support (1)
- io.py: non-NIfTI format read/write (2)
- clustered_neuro_vol.py: arithmetic/comparison ops (2)

title: read_image parity: type/index behavior and 4D index slicing
description: Continuing parity sweep: completed scalar indices fix in read_vec and no additional changes since this checkpoint.

title: Create regression tests for all confirmed parity defects
description: Create regression tests for confirmed parity defects; keep mapping in issue body with IDs and expected parity behavior.

title: Support reverse scalar arithmetic for NeuroVol/NeuroVec
description: Extended fix scope: added reverse arithmetic for NeuroSlice as well (src/neuroimpy/neuro_slice.py) and regression test test_phase4_neuroslice.py::TestNeuroSliceOperations::test_reverse_scalar_arithmetic. Current coverage now includes scalar-on-left operations for Vol, Vec, and Slice.

title: Run stress/invariant checks and file-based fuzz tests
description: Generate synthetic data inputs and boundary cases for neuroimpy operations; report flaky or deterministic failures for parity mismatches.

title: Add NeuroVol compatibility aliases vol_mean/vol_sd/which_min/which_max
description: Added , , ,  on  in  with compatibility aliases. Added regression tests in  for alias outputs and index correctness (F-order flat argmin/argmax).

title: searchlight nonzero flag is ignored for ROI membership
description: Patched searchlight.py to pass user-provided nonzero to spherical_roi in searchlight_iterator and searchlight_coords; added tests in test_searchlight.py asserting nonzero=False includes zero-valued centers and zero voxels in ROIs.

title: Preserve NamedAxis direction in axis set transforms
description: Implemented fix and regression tests. axis_set now preserves NamedAxis objects/directions when provided, and flip/permute/drop/add axis helpers now pass NamedAxis lists through instead of rebuilding by names only. Added tests in tests/test_phase1_core.py for flip, permutation, drop, and add direction preservation.
close_reason: Patched axis direction preservation in axis transforms and added regression tests in tests/test_phase1_core.py

title: spherical_roi ignores spacing in radius
description: Implemented spacing-aware spherical_roi distance calculation and added regression tests in test_phase5_roi.py and test_searchlight.py verifying anisotropic spacing neighborhoods and searchlight propagation.

title: write_vol/write_vec reject unsupported NIfTI data_type
description: Confirmed NIfTI write API mismatch fixed in src/neuroimpy/io.py: data_type for write_vol/write_vec now validated (supports aliases FLOAT/FLOAT32/FLOAT64/DOUBLE, INT*/UINT* supported set) and raises ValueError for unsupported NIfTI data_type. Added regression tests in tests/test_io_comprehensive.py: test_write_vol_rejects_invalid_data_type, test_write_vec_rejects_invalid_data_type, test_write_vec_accepts_float_alias (checks header dtype == float64).

title: searchlight uses wrong linear index order and center_index
description: Implemented Fortran-order center indexing and center_index tracking across searchlight/random/bootstrap/coords; searchlight_coords nonzero=False now iterates all voxels; fixed clustered cvol label lookup to use F-order. Added regression tests for these behaviors in tests/test_searchlight.py.

title: Bug: read_image should support AFNI auto-dispatch
description: read_image in io.py always used nibabel for dispatch, which breaks AFNI (.HEAD/.BRIK) inputs and makes parity with neuroim2::read_image incomplete for list inputs. Fix: detect descriptor and dispatch AFNI via read_vol/read_vec; add tests for AFNI and multi-file list behavior.

title: Fix NeuroSpace.add_dim and drop_dim transform preservation
description: Additional confirmed parity bug in NeuroSpace methods: add_dim()/drop_dim() were NameError-prone because axis_set was not imported in neuro_space.py. This breaks both methods when invoked. Patched import in src/neuroimpy/neuro_space.py and added regression assertions in tests/test_phase1_core.py for axis metadata after add_dim/drop_dim.

title: match_axis should accept full direction keywords
description: Implemented full-label support in match_axis (LEFT/RIGHT/ANTERIOR/POSTERIOR/INFERIOR/SUPERIOR and spaced/underscored phrases) and added axis-name parity assertions in tests/test_phase1_core.py.

title: random_searchlight missing parity nonzero argument
description: Updated random_searchlight signature to accept nonzero flag and pass-through to spherical_roi; added regression test ensuring nonzero=False keeps zeros in sampled neighborhood.

title: Python write parity: NIfTI format and data_type defaults/aliases
description: Fixed parity mismatch for write_vol/write_vec in NIfTI alias support: accepted format aliases NIFTI1/NIFTI-1, dtype aliases SHORT/INT plus BINARY/BYTE aliases, and defaulted output to FLOAT for NIfTI when data_type is omitted. Added regression tests in tests/test_io_comprehensive.py for these behaviors. Additional bug found/fixed: default AFNI write path should keep inferred dtype (not force FLOAT), covered by tests/test_afni_io.py test_write_read_vol_afni_defaults_to_compatible_dtype.
